The plant is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been reported to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lutzia cretica include its potential to treat various conditions, such as respiratory infections, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Lutzia cretica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
